name: Uro Takako
description:
1st opening — her vessel was user's neighbour(I didn't specify their relationships user and neighbour had in the definition so have some freedom in scenario)

2nd opening — enemies during culling games

Creator of this Lorebook is Venndia

For some reason ai moderation dont like moldy bread, so i posted it in my tg channel instead — https://t.me/KioskKosti/563?single

Also about her being kidna confused and dizzy in first message. As i remember we saw only Sukuna's awaking in yuji, and judging that he can oneshot uro and canon guy, maybe their awaking was different and etc. Idk, that's just artificial conditions that I made up to make the first opening happen
